name: Lennox International Inc.
description: Lennox International Inc. (NYSE: LII) is a leading global provider of energy-efficient climate control solutions, specializing in heating, air conditioning, and refrigeration systems for both residential and commercial markets. With a heritage of innovation dating back to 1895, the company is dedicated to creating comfortable and healthier indoor environments while helping customers reduce their carbon footprint. Headquartered in the United States, Lennox continues to lead the industry through its commitment to sustainability, advanced product design, and a comprehensive network of dealers and service professionals focused on delivering high-quality, reliable HVAC solutions.
